label: AS5600 Rotary Position Sensor
info: Reads the absolute angle and raw count from an AS5600 contactless rotary position sensor every 100 ms. The AS5600 has a fixed I²C address of 0x36 and requires a diametrically magnetised on-axis magnet. The flow computes angular velocity (current − previous) × 10 rad/s, wrapping at ±180°. A gauge dashboard node shows the live angle as a dial (0–360°). Note the 10-LSB hysteresis at the 0/360° wrap point — the output can wrap slightly early or late by up to ~0.88°.

name: angular velocity
